name: web-design-guidelines
description: Audits files for compliance with Vercel's web interface guidelines, fetching the latest rules from the source.

name: frontend-design
description: Guides creation of distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic AI aesthetics.

name: audit-website
description: Audits websites for SEO, performance, security and accessibility issues across 230+ rules using squirrelscan.

name: systematic-debugging
description: Enforces root-cause investigation before any fix attempt — no patches without understanding the problem first.

name: brainstorming
description: Turns ideas into fully formed designs through collaborative dialogue — explores context, asks questions, proposes approaches, and produces a design doc.

name: seo-audit
description: Comprehensive SEO audit covering crawlability, technical foundations, on-page optimization, content quality, and actionable recommendations.
